one_line_description: Pay-as-you-go SEO data APIs covering SERPs, keywords, backlinks, on-page audits, and domain analytics.
auth_summary: Basic authentication only: API login (account email) plus an auto-generated API password, Base64-encoded in the Authorization header. Docs explicitly state Basic auth is the only way to access the API and credentials cannot be passed as URL parameters.
access_notes: Self-serve registration; API credentials (login + auto-generated API password) are issued with the account. Usage is billed via a pay-as-you-go credit balance rather than a subscription.
api_surface_summary: REST API v3 with many modules: SERP, Keywords Data, Backlinks, OnPage, DataForSEO Labs, Business Data, Domain Analytics, Content Analysis, AI Optimization, and Merchant.
agent_notes: Very clean target: single documented auth method, broad documented REST surface, official vendor MCP (npm dataforseo-mcp-server plus hosted endpoint mcp.dataforseo.com/mcp). Only real caveat is that all calls consume paid credits.
